nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous content creator
nodes.grounding_span: I tell the AI the type of account I am working on and have it recommend generic post ideas for me

nodes.label: AI as writing reviewer and editor
nodes.label_negative: AI as primary writer replacing human authorship
nodes.grounding_span: I typically write the job descriptions myself and then ask the AI to review and make suggestions

nodes.label: Authenticity in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I value authenticity in my work. It's okay with me morally if AI helps make improvements but the original product is my own

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or inefficient for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I had a social media project dropped in my lap last minute that needed content to post ASAP

nodes.label: AI as tool for understanding AI limitations
nodes.label_negative: AI capability to fully automate project management
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools are useful but ultimately fallible

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: I am not influenced by any of my colleagues in my AI usage

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I value authenticity in my work

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to get content posted relatively quickly

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: actively pursue continuing education to make sure I am up-to-date in my field

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I liked 2 of them enough to move forward

nodes.label: No personal concern about AI in own work
nodes.grounding_span: It's not cool if I have AI do every step of the process for me- it's lazy and unoriginal

nodes.label: Confidence in ability to adapt to AI-driven roles
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see AI being able to 'take over' my job

nodes.label: Resistance to over-reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'm much more concerned about people becoming overly reliant on AI tools to the detriment of their own skills

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I typically write the job descriptions myself and then ask the AI to review and make suggestions

nodes.label: Independent exploration and self-directed learning about AI
nodes.grounding_span: I like to stay on top of news related to evolving AI capabilities and will research and explore different AI tools
